programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: LUCAS BOHN is energetic with an edge. The perfect blend of schoolboy charm and bad-boy charisma, his comedy is both smart and audacious. Known as the little guy who generates big laughs, Lucas has shared the stage with Dave Chappelle, Jimmy Fallon, and Kevin Hart. Lucas' high-energy shows and hilarious impersonations make him an instant hit with audiences of all ages. In 2013 Lucas was nominated "Comedian of the Year" by Campus Activities Magazine.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: As a mother of seven, Chelle T has seen it all, and shes not afraid to joke about it. Quippy and honest, Chelle T talks about how children are raised differently these days, menopause, being married for twenty-three years, and how desperate you sometimes become when youre a mom in this special.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: Nikki Carr: I Wish These Were Jokes.
programme.desc: Nikki Carr is 57 and feeling great. After all, she's got the career where all you have to do is be yourself and have a good time . . . two things she subsequently gave up for her goal weight.

programme.title: Joe Devito
programme.desc: Joe DeVito's dead-on timing and unexpected twists make him a favorite at comedy clubs across the USA. His TV appearances include The Late Late Show, Last Comic Standing, Comedy Central, Comics Unleashed, and AXStv's Gotham Comedy Live. He's also a regular on TV news panels, finding the funny in pop culture and current events. Joe's albums First Date with Joe DeVito and Three's Comedy are in regular rotation on SiriusXM radio.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Andy recently appeared on Conan on TBS. Around that same time, his half-hour special premiered on Comedy Central. He was the first comedian to make his network television debut on “The Tonight Show starring Jimmy Fallon”. He also appeared on Comics Unleashed with Byron Allen, and Gotham Comedy Live on AXS. He had also appeared on Comedy Central's “Live at Gotham” in 2009.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Former high school football coach and drama teacher, Marty Simpson jokes about how to punish teenagers, getting rid of 500 bats in his attic, and how his love language is sarcasm.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Steve Bruner looks like a perfectly normal guy—until he opens his mouth. He's delivered his laser-sharp humor on Comedy Club Network (Showtime), An Evening at the Improv (A&E), Into the Night (ABC), and The Byron Allen Show (NBC), to name a few.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Tom Foss has traveled around the world entertaining our troops. Including 5 tours to Iraq, 6 tours of Afghanistan, 11 tours of the middle east, 4 tours of Europe, 3 tours of the Far East, Greenland, 5 aircraft carriers, support ships and bases all around the United States. While not on tour overseas Foss keeps his foot on the ground as a regular at the Improvs, Funnybones and the world famous Hollywood Comedy Store.

programme.title: Key Lewis
programme.sub-title: Half Black, Half White, Looks Mexican
programme.desc: Sacramento California born Key Lewis is a high energy, improvisational, storytelling, multiple-personality nutcase! His love for the people and hunger for the stage is his undying motivation. His comedic stories about his interracial childhood, family, and unusual views on relationships, make Key simply a joy to watch. His ability to improvise and interact with all types of crowds makes this up and coming comic and actor one to look out for. Key Lewis has appeared on Marlon Wayans TBSís Funniest Wins, Starz Networks StaannDup, Kevin Harts One Mic Stand as well as Bill Bellamyís Whoís Got Jokes! Key says, chase your dream, always know your audience donít act funny, be funny... donít worry about the quantity of your material but the quality the sooner you create a relationship with your crowd, the better you will be. Television: Bill Bellamyís Whoís Got Jokes on TVONE. BETíS One Mic Stand Hosted by Kevin Hart. Starz Network Comedy Series called StaannDup, Marlon Wayanís TBSís Funniest Wins! Competitions: Winner of the 2013 Rocky Mountain Laugh Off, Finalist in the 2010 Bay Area Black Comedy Competition, Semi-Finalist 2009 San Francisco International Comedy Competition, a Semi-Finalist in the 2008 Boston Comedy Festival, 2007 Seattle International Comedy Competition Finalist, Shades of Laughs Portland Oregon Winner, TVONE Bill Bellamyís Who Got Jokeís Contestant. Radio: Improv work with FM Morning Shows (Top 40 Radio): KSFM 102.5 (Sacramento, CA), KWOD 106.5 (Sacramento, CA) KWIN 97.7 ñ Stockton/Lodi, CA, Mix 107.9 Salt Lake City UT (Is It Racist Segment) & The Man Panel. Concerts/Festivals: Opened for Jon B. and Keysha Cole, Taste Of Tacoma, & Bite Of Seattle Fountain Stage 5 Years Running! Key Lewis has worked with the likes of Kevin Hart, Pablo Francisco, Sam Bam, Alonzo Bodden, Jay London, Gabriel Iglesias, Brooks McBeth, Tommy Davidson, Katt Williams, De-Ray Davis, Andrew Norelli, Lonnie Love, Jeff Garcia, Damon Wayans, Joey Diaz, Guy Torry, Darren Carter, Paul Mooney, Kermet Apio and many more.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Matt Knudsen was born in Hawaii, raised in the Mid-west and sailed around the world as a merchant marine. As an actor, Matt shared the big screen with Oscar winner Sean Penn in Gangster Squad, or you may also recognize him from his appearances in shows like Crazy Ex-Girlfriend, Key & Peele, Workaholics, The League, Big Love, Boston Legal or Malcolm in the Middle just to name a few. Matt has also been a part of several high profile commercial campaigns for companies including: Apple, IBM, GE, Volkswagen, DirecTV, Pepsi and more which have aired during the Superbowl and The Olympics. As a comedian, he's appeared on Conan, The Late Late Show, Last Call, ASX Live and Comics Unleashed, as well as dozens of festivals, including: Montreal Just for Laughs (Best of the Fest), The San Francisco Sketchfest, Bridgetown, High Plains, Limestone and has even entertained at The White House for President and Mrs. Obama.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents Plastic Cup Boyz
programme.desc: Joey Wells, Will Spank Horton, and Na'im Lynn take the stage in this comedy special taped at the House of Blues in San Diego.

programme.title: Kevin Hart Presents Keith Robinson
programme.desc: Keith Robinson brings his in-your-face style to everything from the moment he stopped liking his own son to the real reason why Obama was elected.

programme.title: Gary Owen: Black Famous
programme.desc: From catching COVID to running out of shows to watch, this special is full of riotously funny real life stories you've come to expect from Gary.

programme.title: Gary Owen Breakin' Out the Park
programme.desc: In this brutally honest stand-up performance Owen confesses his hilarious history of growing up in and around trailer parks.

programme.title: Chris Porter Ugly and Angry
programme.desc: Last Coming Standing alum, Chris Porter, gives his look on drugs, growing old, womens fashion, and his love for Taco Bell.

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Sebastian Dellacourt is leading a double life: he tells his wife that he's a humble systems analyst. But he's actually a D-list actor starring in films by the director of Time Chasers and Radical Jack! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of MST3K).

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this Italian Jaws rip off. So get in the boat and join Mike, Kevin and Bill for The Last Shark!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: The stars of Mystery Science Theater 3000 bring their comedic riffing treatment to this short about con-men. Join Mike, Kevin, and Bill for On Guard Bunco!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Everyone knows Hercules (or Heracles, if you're really fun to talk to at parties), the mighty Greek whose heroic exploits included cleaning up tons of horse crap. But not everyone knows his sons, who for some reason went by the name The Sons of Hercules! Join Mike, Kevin and Bill for The Sons of Hercules!

programme.title: RiffTrax
programme.desc: Merlin, the legendary wizard is stuck inside a terrible nether dimension. Meanwhile, the former stars of Wayne's World, Highlander, and The Young Ones are stuck in a terrible movie about Merlin, the legendary wizard. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from RiffTrax (formerly of Mystery Science Theater 3000).

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: An ex-F.B.I. Agent (Tommy Lee Jones) and an ex-mob lawyer in the Witness Protection Program (Morgan Freeman) have to put aside their petty rivalry on the golf course to fend off a mob hit.

programme.title: Blue Iguana
programme.desc: Small-time crooks Eddie and Paul are in over their heads when a cute London lawyer hires them to steal a rare jewel. Meanwhile, a mullet-haired gangster wants the gem for himself. Bullets and sparks fly in this pond-hopping comedic caper.

programme.title: Vengeance: A Love Story
programme.desc: Single mother Teena is brutally assaulted by a gang. When the criminals are set free, Detective John Dromoor is dismayed as to the lack of justice and plots revenge.

programme.title: The Warrior's Way
programme.desc: Yang, the world's finest swordsman, packs it in and leaves Japan to find an old friend in the Wild West rather than kill the infant queen of a rival clan. He carries the baby to his friend's desolate, broken-down town the friend has died, so Yang reopens a laundry and settles down, hanging wet clothes, growing flowers, raising the infant, and finding himself attracted to Lynne, a red-haired woman with a tragic past. As long as Yang keeps his sword sheathed, his rivals won't find him, but a band of reprobate gunmen terrorize the town and threaten Lynne. Showdowns are inevitable, but once the sword is drawn, can Yang find rest, a home, and a family?

programme.title: Deadline
programme.desc: A screenwriter travels to an abandoned house to finish a script on time.

programme.title: Love, Bubbles & Crystal Cove
programme.desc: The movie follows main character Skye and her bath and body business Lather and Luxury. Her childhood sweetheart arrives in town to help her improve it and sparks fly.

programme.title: Alice Upside Down
programme.desc: Alice Upside Down is the story of an 11-year-old girl who has just moved to a suburb of Washington, D.C. with her father Ben and her 17-year-old brother Lester.

programme.title: Sweet Country
programme.desc: Australian western set on the Northern Territory frontier in the 1920s, where justice itself is put on trial when an aged Aboriginal farmhand shoots a white man in self defense and goes on the run as posse gathers to hunt him down. Festival favorite of Venice, Toronto, and Sundance.

programme.title: The Homesman
programme.desc: Tommy Lee Jones stars in “the best western since UNFORGIVEN” (BBC). A low-life drifter helps a headstrong woman (Hilary Swank) cross the frontier after she rescues him from hanging.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Upon discovering a den of corrupt policemen, a journalist (Justin Timberlake) joins forces with his editor (Morgan Freeman) and a renowned private detective (Kevin Spacey) to bring the force down.

programme.desc: A screenwriter travels to an abandoned house to finish a script on time.

programme.desc: The movie follows main character Skye and her bath and body business Lather and Luxury. Her childhood sweetheart arrives in town to help her improve it and sparks fly.

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: When an aspiring dancer is dropped by her partner days before her big performance, she'll need to teach a down-and-out boxer some moves to win the prize money and open her dream dance studio.

programme.title: The Shrink Is In
programme.desc: A young woman impersonates a shrink to win over her Prince Charming.

programme.title: Accidentally Engaged
programme.desc: Famous actor Chas Hunter and aspiring actress Clarissa Byers agree to fake an engagement to improve both their reputations. However, playing pretend starts to feel all too real as the two start to fall for one another.

programme.title: The Happiness Playbook
programme.desc: Journalist Amy goes undercover at a happiness retreat run by the handsome Paul, but soon learns he is the son of a wealthy investor forcing her to choose between her career and love.

programme.title: Love, Game, Match
programme.desc: When the new economics teacher Liz team up with tennis coach Ted to organize the school carnival, sparks fly.

programme.title: Nearlyweds

programme.title: Summer in the City
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Movie. A midwestern girl tries to adopt a big city personality with disastrous results.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. Two guests arrive at Grey House and are immediately at odds.

programme.title: Good Witch
programme.desc: Hallmark Original Series. The town is caught up in romance when Cassie helps Ben find an old film.

programme.title: The Wedding March

programme.title: Murder on Maple Drive
programme.desc: A couple purchases a home, and after they move in, strange things begin to happen.

programme.title: My Life is a Lifetime Movie: Lovely Little Liars
programme.desc: True stories of women in peril as told by the people involved. A teacher's sex scandal with one of her students turns everything upside down.

programme.title: The Hillsdale Adoption Scam
programme.desc: Bethany and Terrence are desperate to find another brother for their daughter.

programme.title: Remember Me, Mommy?
programme.desc: Rebecca, a teacher at Clark Academy, an elite girls boarding school, has a secret.

programme.title: Murder on Maple Drive
programme.desc: A couple purchases a home, and after they move in, strange things begin to happen.

programme.title: Punisher: War Zone
programme.desc: When a gangster is injured by The Punisher, he swears revenge and recruits an army of dangerous men.

programme.title: The Spirit
programme.desc: THE SPIRIT takes us on a sinister, gut-wrenching ride with a hero who is born, murdered and born again.

programme.title: Gods of Egypt
programme.desc: A mortal teams with the god Horus in an alliance against Set, the god of darkness, who usurped Egypt's throne.

programme.title: The Legend of Hercules
programme.desc: Banished by the king, Hercules harnesses his powers and gathers an army to fight his way back to his kingdom.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: The world needed a hero, we got a hedgehog. Superpowered with speed, Sonic races to save the world and stop evil genius Dr. Robotnik from world domination. Jim Carrey, Ben Schwartz and James Marsden star in the adventure the whole family will enjoy.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: From director Michael Bay and executive producer Steven Spielberg comes a thrilling battle between the heroic Autobots and the evil Decepticons. When their epic struggle comes to Earth, Sam Witwicky becomes mankind's last chance for survival.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon
programme.desc: A mysterious event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet. Sam Witwicky and the Autobots must fight against the darkness to defend our world from the Decepticons.

programme.title: Fences
programme.desc: A working-class African-American father tries to raise his family in the 1950s

programme.title: Amistad
programme.desc: AMISTAD is about a 1839 mutiny onboard a slave ship that is traveling towards the Northeast Coast of America

programme.title: Chinatown
programme.desc: Jake Gittes, a private eye, uncovers a web of personal and political scandals

programme.title: Heartsounds
programme.desc: New York urologist Harold Lear (Garner) gets a taste of his own medicine when he suffers a heart attack and is confronted with a medical institution which doesn't seem equipped to help.

programme.title: Courage And The Passion
programme.desc: The story of test pilots, the women in their lives and the anxieties of personnel at an air force testing facility.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: After the fall of Tobruk in June 1942, U.S. Army sergeant Joe Gunn leads his tank into the Sahara desert.

programme.title: Ike: Countdown To D-Day
programme.desc: A study of the days leading up to the Normandy invasion through the eyes of Eisenhower and Winston Churchill.

programme.title: The Last Hurrah
programme.desc: An aging New England Mayor is defeated in a hard-fought re-election campaign involving shady transactions by both political groups.

programme.title: The Mouse That Roared
programme.desc: An outlandish, sidesplitting tale of the fortunes of the Duchy of Grand Fenwick.

programme.title: Too Many Husbands
programme.desc: An excellent romantic comedy starring Jean Arthur, who is married to Melvyn Douglas. When her first husband (Fred MacMurray), thought dead, shows up, he turns her world upside down. Comic tensions flare when both husbands vie for Arthur's affections. The two men finally become fed up with Arthur's love for attention--they leave and become friends.

programme.title: A Study In Terror
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes and Dr. Watson join the hunt for the notorious serial killer, Jack The Ripper.

programme.title: Paris When It Sizzles
programme.desc: Richard Quine directs George Axelrod's acerbic script (adapted from Julien Duvivier's La Fête à Henriette) in this romantic comedy that reunites William Holden and Audrey Hepburn for the first time since 1954's Sabrina.

programme.title: War and Peace
programme.desc: The personal stories of many characters, love affairs and philosophies are woven throughout this massive and intricate tapestry of Russia during Napoleon's invasion at the turn of the 19th century.

programme.title: Stalag 17
programme.desc: Laced with comedy and cynicism, this is the story of a group of GIs who are thrown together in the notorious German prison camp Stalag 17, their suspicions about one being a spy and their efforts to escape.

programme.title: Lady On a Train
programme.desc: A mystery writer helps a woman solve the murder that she witnessed from her train window.

programme.title: Becoming

programme.title: Countdown

programme.title: Countdown

programme.title: Vs.

programme.title: Vs.
programme.desc: We love a good film with Florence Pugh and Saoirse Ronan, but which will win this episode of Versus?

programme.title: Trailers Reloaded
programme.desc: Check out these films that celebrate LGBTQ romance.

programme.title: On Our Way
programme.desc: A troubled filmmaker struggles to accept his latest piece of work as the story reveals how he lost the love of his life.

programme.title: Hit By Lightning
programme.desc: Loser Ricky (Jon Cryer) has given up on love, until he meets mysterious Danita through an online dating site.

programme.title: I Used To Go Here
programme.desc: Following the launch of her new novel, writer Kate Conklin is asked to speak at her alma mater by her old professor. Soon Kate finds herself deeply enmeshed in the lives of a group of college students. Starring Gillian Jacobs, Jemaine Clement

programme.title: The Trouble With Bliss
programme.desc: The Trouble With Bliss is a comedic coming of age story about a guy who should have come of age a long time ago.

programme.title: Braking for Whales
programme.desc: A dysfunctional brother and sister are forced to come to terms with each other and themselves over their recently deceased mother's final wish. Starring Tom Felton, Tammin Sursok, Wendi Mclendon-Covey, David Koechner, and Austin Swift.

programme.title: May the Best Wedding Win
programme.desc: Tiffany and her frenemy compete over wedding bookings, despite her not having a real fiancé.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Liz and the Kappa Psi Psi prepare for the Gamma Fair. Liz receives the T-shirts she ordered to sell to raise money. The Gamma guys are busy, too, even with Pete underfoot. Joe gives Pete a task that is a little too much for him to handle. Meanwhile, Alan has inspired Anna in his Women's Lit class to change her appearance in hopes of catching a guy like Alan. Professor Presser is not impressed.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: The Gamma Pi Omicron Brothers take their pledges on retreat while Pete recuperates at the Gamma House. Back on campus, Sarah begins a friendship with Jordan while Allison convinces the Resident Director to give her what she wants.

programme.title: Eat, Love, London
programme.desc: Stella takes a job at a new London restaurant and ends up falling for the chef.

programme.title: Love Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Ghostwriter Becca unexpectedly ends up on the trail from a legendary novel with action star Lee.

programme.title: The Boxer and the Butterfly
programme.desc: A dancer and a boxer must team up for a big performance after a last minute drop out.

programme.title: Primal Secrets
programme.desc: The veneer of extravagant Manhattan and Long Island high society appears glamorous and alluring, but as this story demonstrates, grand appearances often lead to violent deceptions.

programme.title: Wedding Talk
programme.desc: From barns to train stations to botanical gardens to a Miami mansion, these weddings stand out from the crowd and deliver stunning visuals and big time fun.

programme.title: Christmas Catch
programme.desc: Detective Bennett is on the trail of a thief and goes undercover to find where he's hiding the loot. While undercover, she falls for the supposed thief and begins to suspect that he's been framed. Was he framed? Or are feelings clouding her judgment?

programme.title: Dear Santa
programme.desc: A young woman from a privileged life falls for a soup-kitchen owner after discovering a Dear Santa letter written by his 7-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Chandler Christmas Getaway
programme.desc: The Chandlers pack up and head to a cabin for maximum Family fun. With old feuds, new feuds, and a heap of Family stress, the Chandler family must pull together to make this the best Christmas ever.

programme.title: Running Turtle
programme.desc: Phil-sung, a laid-back detective, begins his struggle to catch Ki-tae, an assassin who breaks out of prison.

programme.title: The Table (MINARI'S YE-RI HAN)
programme.desc: At the same table in the café, 4 pairs of people talked, their stories saturated with dream, hope, and fear.

programme.title: Love, So Divine
programme.desc: Theology student Kyu-shik meets Bong-hee before ordination. They bond deeply and are attracted to each other.

programme.title: OK! MADAM
programme.desc: Mi-Young runs a shop at a traditional market, where she makes and sells twisted bread sticks. Her husband Seok-Hwan works as a computer repairman. One day, Seok-Hwan wins a free trip to Hawaii. Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan will go on their first international trip together. When Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan get on the airplane to Hawaii, things don't go as expected. Terrorists, including Cheol-Seung, who chase after a secret agent, get on the same airplane. The passengers soon become hostages. Suddenly, Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan begin to rescue the passengers.

programme.title: 16 Bars to Love
programme.desc: Niles and Mina are rappers who are pursuing a chance to audition for the hottest young producer in New York, Magic the Music Maker. They share a secret with each other that came from mysterious circumstances and as they experience beginning success as rappers, they must learn the truth of the secret about their family.

programme.title: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Stacy is a freshman at a Historic Black College & University. She Meets and falls in love with a Grad Student named Benjamin. He's nice and charming at first. Until he starts to control her and physically, psychologically, and verbally abuse her. Can Stacy get out of this domestic violence relationship before it's too late?

programme.title: Behind Closed Doors 2: Toxic Workplace
programme.desc: Newly hired employee, Joy, has high hopes for success at her new marketing job. Her boss' intentions are anything but professional.

programme.title: Cake
programme.desc: Young pastry chef, Ronnie, dreams of opening her own bakery, but friends, family, and her love life have plans of their own.

programme.title: Nine Lives (aka: Unstoppable)
programme.desc: Dean Cage is a former CIA agent who suffers from extreme PTSD. While in a program to resolve the stress of the loss his brother-in-law, he is mistaken for an FBI agent and thrust into action.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: A father (John Cusack) gets entangled in the latest assignment of a dangerous assassin (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: Shade
programme.desc: Tiffany (Jamie Foxx), Charlie (Gabriel Byrne) and Vernon (Thandie Newton) are con artists looking to up the ante from their typical scams. They figure a good way of doing this is taking down Dean "The Dean" Stevens (Dina Merrill), a well-known cardsharp, in a rigged game. However, they first need enough money to enter a game with Stevens, so they decide to strike a deal with fellow crook Larry Jennings (Stuart Townsend) to scam a local gangster -- which turns out to be a bad idea.

programme.title: Trespass
programme.desc: Fast-talking diamond dealer Kyle Miller (Nicolas Cage) and his wife, Sarah (Nicole Kidman), live the good life in a beautiful home surrounded by thick woods. Their dream life turns into a nightmare when violent thieves, led by Elias (Ben Mendelsohn), invade their home disguised as police officers. With Kyle and Sarah now frightened captives, Kyle knows he must use every negotiating trick in his book, for once Elias and his men get what they want, the Millers will likely be killed.

programme.title: Eye See You
programme.desc: Recovering from the psychological effects of witnessing a brutal crime, FBI Agent Jake Malloy (Sylvester Stallone) checks into a rehabilitation clinic for law enforcement officers in the remote wilderness of Wyoming during the dead of winter. He soon finds himself helping other patients as a serial killer begins killing them one by one.

programme.title: Earthstorm
programme.desc: After a massive asteroid crashes into the moon, it's discovered that the moon's structure is now entirely unstable, threatening all life on Earth.

programme.title: King of the Avenue
programme.desc: An ambitious drug dealer sells his soul to the devil to become the city's biggest drug boss, knowing that when Satan comes to collect, he'll have to outwit a most evil force.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: A father (John Cusack) gets entangled in the latest assignment of a dangerous assassin (Morgan Freeman).

programme.desc: When brutal tidal waves suddenly destroy many coastal communities in a short period of time, John Wahl (Corbin Bernsen), a Nobel Prize winner, teams up with a Navy officer to find out the cause of the disaster.

programme.title: Seal
programme.desc: Seals one-of-a-kind soaring, husky baritone voice is perfect for any genre. Hes delighted fans and earned critical acclaim while staying true to classic, honest songwriting in his remarkable two-decade career. And now, hes done it again with the release of his exceptional sixth studio album Soul. Together with legendary music producer David Foster, Seal adds his signature touch to some of the best soul songs ever created. In a stunning performance, Seal evokes an era when music vividly captured emotion and romance. Joined by Foster, as well as a choir and string section, Seal takes on Ann Pebbles I Cant Stand the Rain, Sam Cookes A Change Is Gonna Come, and Harold Melvin and the Blue Notes If You Dont Know Me By Now. Tune in and catch more timeless favorites and hits like Kiss From a Rose.

programme.title: Michael Bublé
programme.desc: Caught in the Act is the second live album released by Canadian jazz crooner Michael Bublé. It was filmed and recorded at the Wiltern Theater in Los Angeles. The filmed concert was aired on PBS as an episode of Great Performances, and the show was subsequently released on DVD along with the audio CD to create the album package, although the audio disc only featured eight of the songs from the concert. The concert featured a few guest artists, including Laura Pausini, Chris Botti, and with an unexpected comedic banter with Bublé, Josh Groban.

programme.title: Marimar

programme.title: María, la del barrio

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Meche duda del amor que Santiago siente por ella. Andresito es dado de alta y por fin regresa a su hogar. Meche planea celebrarle a Rosario sus 15 años para invitar a Jorge Luis y verlo de nuevo.

programme.title: Marimar

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa continúa su venganza contra Aída y no pierde oportunidad para hacerla sentir menos. Fernando presenta a Luisa como su novia. Mariano sigue creyendo que Teresa aún lo quiere y la besa. Aurora los encuentra.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa y Aurora se encuentran con Rubén en la primera comunión del hermano de Esperanza. Teresa se pone celosa al ver a Aurora cerca de Mariano. La familia de Esperanza se entera de que Rubén es casado. Esperanza encuentra a Rubén con Genoveva.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Esperanza llega a casa de Teresa huyendo de Rubén y descubre que él y su esposa están cenando con Arturo. Mariano le lleva una serenata a Teresa y Juana impide que Arturo se entere. Esperanza descubre que está embarazada de Rubén.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel
programme.desc: Blanca estalla en el juicio cuando ve que Juan Miguel es acusado arteramente por el fiscal. Omar busca a Marichuy y le ofrece perdonarlo todo y volver con él a la hacienda. Cecilia le pide a Rocío que la ayude a acercarse a Marichuy.

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel

programme.title: Cuidado con el Ángel

programme.desc: Alfonsina habla con su hermano Héctor sobre su identidad, pero él lo toma a mal. Alejandro conversa con sus padres.

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Hugo se ocupa de la exhumación y le entrega los restos a Alfonsina. Ella tiene más preguntas que respuestas. ¿Qué secreto oculta esa urna?

programme.title: El manantial
programme.desc: Alfonsina hace averiguaciones sobre la muerte de su padre. Gertrudis es incapaz de traicionar a su hermana y su tío también se llama a silencio.

programme.title: 40 y 20

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Morris está en la etapa de las dudas y pregunta a sus padres cómo conquistar al amor de su vida Alejandra y Rocko deciden contarle una historia de amor, el relato de cómo se conocieron.

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles

programme.title: Una familia de diez

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Iñaki se queda sin Paloma y Roberta. León ordena a Diego que deje la banda como condición para reabrir la carnicería. Alma le dice a Franco que deben olvidar sus sentimientos. Sabrina busca a Miguel en el colegio y se encuentra con Mia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Diego consigue a los padres de Giovanni dos locales más grandes para su carnicería. Franco convence a Alma para iniciar una relación. Paloma llama a Iñaki mi amor delante de Roberta. Mia se enfrenta a Sabrina y le pregunta si ha besado a Miguel.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Iñaki se niega a presentar a Roberta a sus padres como su novia. Diego confiesa que su padre le obligó a dejar la banda. Rocco descubre que Tato está vendiendo artículos robados. Roberta exige a Reverte que le cuente su historia.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Reverte miente a Roberta para que no descubra que es su padre. Lola intenta seducir a Diego, pero éste la rechaza. Roberta se entera de que Iñaki ni siquiera tiene primos. Alma y Franco planean vivir con Roberta para que ella acepte a Franco.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma les dice a Roberta y a Mia que van a cenar todos juntos en casa de Franco. Raquel golpea a Sol por coquetear con Teo. Johnny firma con RBD para grabar su primer disco. Sabrina aprovecha la ausencia de Mia y lleva a Miguel a cenar.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta se resiste a convivir con Franco y Mia. Santos habla con Lola para advertirle que Diego está enamorado de Roberta. Miguel es seducido por Sabrina y engaña a Mia. Diego le pide a Roberta que retomen su relación.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Miguel se siente terrible por haber dormido con Sabrina, después ella se presenta en la escuela. Llegan a hacer una auditoría a Gandía. Diego presenta a Lola como su novia. Mía le confiesa a Miguel que está lista para su primera vez con él.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Antonio le dice a Victoria que no le dejará la empresa a Bruno, pues no es un hombre responsable. En medio de una discusión con Bruno, Antonio sufre un accidente.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alex sufre un terrible accidente ocasionado por Bruno. Bruno le hace creer a Victoria que Alex se casó con una mujer llamada María José. Victoria le informa a María José que Alex está muerto.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Bruno amenaza al padre de María José con contarle a la policía que vende mercancía robada si no lo ayuda a engañar a la prensa.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alex logra comunicarse con su familia y todos se alegran al saber que está vivo, pero Paula sabe que ella y María José están en peligro. María José se niega a ayudar a Bruno en su terrible plan.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje
programme.desc: Renato le deja en claro a Aimeé que la matará si llega a engañarlo. Clemencia le cuenta a Juan la historia de sus padres. Juan enfrenta a Rodrigo afuera de la iglesia y descubre que es padre de Regina y Aimeé.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje
programme.desc: Aimeé extraña a Juan, pero no logra encontrarlo. María se encuentra enferma y Arcadio se niega a ayudarla. Servando intenta abusar de Jimena y ella lo golpea creyendo que lo mató, busca a Regina para que la ayude.

programme.title: Corazón salvaje
programme.desc: Juan decide irse antes de matar a Rodrigo y hacerle daño a la mujer que ama. Raúl intenta suicidarse creyendo que Juan le hará daño. Gabriel encuentra a María y la lleva a casa de Juan para ayudarla. María confunde a Juan con su padre.

programme.title: Guerra entre bandas
programme.desc: La mafia ha decidido eliminar a un hombre porque considera que sabe demasiado, pero ignora de lo que es capaz.

programme.sub-title: Más vale solo andar, que mal casar
programme.desc: Elena encuentra a su novio en la cama con otra mujer a pesar de eso, lo perdona y acepta casarse con él. Pero en una discusión, David la golpea. A partir de ese momento, las cosas empeoran.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Cuando el diablo reza, engañar quiere

programme.sub-title: Al hombre osado la fortuna le da la mano

programme.sub-title: Si quieres conocer a Inés, vive con ella un mes
programme.desc: Una joven menosprecia a su madre y se obsesiona con el estilo de vida de su vecina al grado de que un día entra a su casa sin permiso. La joven descubre que la vida de su vecina no es tan grandiosa como ella pensaba.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: Por la muestra se conoce el paño
programme.desc: Camila y Alexa son primas y su abuela tiene preferencia por una de ellas. Esto es culpa de sus madres, pues la madre de Camila le ha enseñado a ser presumida y grosera con su prima.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: La novedad es flor de un día, hoy ya no luce lo que ayer lucía
programme.desc: Los celos de José Luis lo están alejando de Marieta y si no hace algo por cambiar, podría perderla para siempre.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Raquel Ortega, juez de la competencia realiza un baile mostrando su talento, Miguel, Hiroshi, Magaby y Jocelyn cantarán junto a un ensamble vocal. Los padres de los pequeños se enfrentan en una competencia de baile.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: En ausencia de Maria José, Lucero llega como invitada especial tomando el papel de juez. Ernesto D'alessio se mide en el karaoke.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: El drama de las misteriosas desapariciones de pilotos y los riesgos a los que se exponen en las selvas andinas.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una mujer contrata a unos sicarios para asesinar a su marido, pero él descubre la verdad y logra salvar su vida.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una confusión pone en riesgo la libertad de un hombre tras el terrible asesinato de un importante empresario canadiense, pero el destino tiene sorpresas para todos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La violencia se ha apoderado de las vidas de miles de mujeres que han sido asesinadas brutalmente por sus propias parejas, por lo que los movimientos contra feminicidios han incrementado considerablemente.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: Narcosubmarinos: Viaje al fondo del mal
programme.desc: Por décadas el narcotráfico ha navegado sigilosamente por los mares más peligrosos para transportar su mercancía, poniendo en peligro la vida de sus tripulantes a cambio de dinero.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una familia destruida tras un ataque inesperado habla sobre todo lo que sufrieron al perder a sus seres queridos en manos de organizaciones delictivas.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.sub-title: El hijo del Chapo: Captura y liberación de un intocable
programme.desc: El ejército mexicano despliega un operativo en Culiacán, Sinaloa, para detener a un familiar de Joaquín Guzmán Loera, 'El Chapo'. El objetivo es capturado y, durante un día, Culiacán queda atrapada en un enfrentamiento entre el ejército y los narcos.

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: This is the new Bugatti Tourbillon, the successor to the Veyron and the Chiron, due to be delivered in 2026. Its looks are very much evolution rather than revolution but unlike its predecessors the Tourbillon doesn't have a turbocharged W16 engine, instead it has a naturally aspirated, 8.3-litre V16 developed with Cosworth. This produces 1000hp on its own but in conjunction with three electric motors the Tourbillon has a combined hybrid system output of 1800hp (1775bhp).As you can hear in this video, it is a pretty incredible sounding engine, revving to 9000rpm. It's a distinctive sound too and for comparison we've included the soundtracks of a couple of its naturally aspirated hypercar rivals - the 6.5-litre V12 from the Aston Martin Valkyrie and the 3.9-litre V12 from the GMA T.50 (both also developed with Cosworth).Bugatti's Director of Design, Frank Heyl, talks Henry Catchpole around all the fascinating exterior details of the 3.8mIllion Euro Tourbillon but we think the interior is perhaps even more spectacular. With clear influence and inspiration taken from mechanical watches the titanium dials are wonders to behold. The steering wheel is pretty crazy too…And talking of watches, the car's name, Tourbillon, means whirlwind in French, but it is a word widely associated with a complicated mechanism found in watches. As Henry explains, with the help of a Ulysse Nardin, it was invented in 1795 to negate the impact of gravity and improve the accuracy of timekeeping in pocket watches.Of course, this being a Bugatti, it is incredibly fast, with a top speed of 276mph (445kph). It is also capable of 0-62mph in 2sec, 0-124mph in under 5sec, 0-186mph in under 10sec and 0-248mph in under 25sec. But in the age of the hyper EV and cars like the the Bugatti's cousin, the Rimac Nevera, pure performance doesn't seem to carry the sway that it once did, so where does that leave the Tourbillon? Catchpole thinks that the answer can be found in the quartz crisis of the 1970s and what followed.

Built with only used and refurbished original and NOS GM parts instead of reproduction "blisterpack" ones, this one of the most thoughtfully built period correct 1960s/1970's style Gasser's Colin has ever seen.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Nancie and Woody moved into a 25-year-old townhouse that required some updating- particularly the floors and the "tiny" kitchen space. As renovations got underway, Woody was unexpectedly hospitalized. The contractors were left virtually unsupervised while Nancie tried to manage her job, visit Woody and take care of their daughter. All of the contractors were very sympathetic to her stating, "don't worry about the renovations- you are in good hands." What they left behind was simply one big mistake- one that Mike and the team will correct, with the help of a Country singing guest star.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Chris and Ihor had recently moved back to Canada after living in Texas for the last 20 years. After looking at 6 homes, they decided on one that was in a good neighborhood and hired a Home Inspector to insure that the home that was in good condition. They received a 25-page report from the home inspector, which concluded that there were only minor items that required addressing- The report also stated that the inspector will only report on surface conditions- for all major home systems such as plumbing and electrical, they defer to hiring "a qualified contractor to conduct the inspection". On moving day, some of the deficiencies became obvious as soon as they tried using the shower and fixtures in the basement. The pungent smell of sewage wafted through the home. It was the first in a series of creepy crawly, smelly and dangerous discoveries. For Chris and Ihor, and for the thousands of Canadians who have been caught in the same trap, it will take the frankness of Mike Holmes to uncover the myth that is "the Home inspection", and help this family get what they thought they had already paid for.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Explore the downsides of custom building as Mike tours a headache of a house.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Jane, a single mom, lives in a typical new home development with her two kids. Since the day they moved into the brand new home, they have been plagued with repeated plumbing and heating issues. During a recent winter cold spell, the porch ceiling caved in, exposin g questionable minimum building code practices and building materials- luckily, Mike and his team have the right answers.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: This is a story about proximity. Many newly built homes such as semi-detached, town homes and condo units feature designs that share common walls. In the case of our homeowners, Sylvie and Guy, who had just moved into a brand new semi-detached home, they were in for a shock when they realized that they could clearly hear their next door neighbor through the walls! The sound issue was so disruptive that the homeowners were certain moving away was their only option, until Mike and the team found the solution.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Tag along as Mike figures out why an icy townhouse attic is making snow cones.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Lisa and Simon were preparing to have their first baby and needed to build a nursery and a bathroom. They found a reputable contractor at a home show with impressive credentials and long list of references. A contract was drafted, a substantial down payment was paid, and the 6-week job would be starting almost immediately. Over the next four months, every excuse was given why they could not start the job. With the realization that they may not have a properly functioning full bathroom, and a new born due in three months- Lisa and Simon fired the contractor- and called Mike Holmes. Time is ticking, with a baby on the way, and a bathroom and nursery that will need to be built again. Mike and the team race to beat the Stork!

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Navigate a bad bathroom reno that two Mike Holmes junkies thought they'd nailed.

programme.title: Chefs A'Field

programme.title: The Road to Recovery
programme.desc: On this premiere of Operation Repo's brand new season, Sonia's rehabilitation from her gunshot wound takes a shocking turn. The whole team runs into trouble on a job when they attempt to repossess a carnival ride from a group of wannabe carnies, Froy and Matt wrangle with a gym owner and his hired muscle, and Lou, Froy, and Sonia repo a truck from a protester in quite the revealing outfit.

programme.title: Monk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Sonia's recovery takes another unexpected turn when she goes too far with a debtor. Sonia and Matt sneak onto a big studio lot to repossess a trailer, but there's a big surprise in store when it turns out Matt and the movie's star have a checkered history, Lou and Sonia interrupt a knitting circle to take a car from a booze-soaked craft enthusiast, and Matt and Froy head out to wine country for a disastrous run-in with a group of debtors who have sworn an oath of silence.

programme.title: Super-Sonia
programme.desc: Things get a lot more complicated for the team when Sonia snaps and puts herself on the business end of a knife and the gangbanger wielding it. Froy and Sonia wind up in the middle of a relationship dispute with an absent-minded professor who's got too many cars and too many girlfriends, Matt and Froy confront a debtor with a tiny motorcycle and an enormous mean streak, and Sonia and Lyndah find themselves in the middle of a gang dispute gone horribly awry.

programme.title: Interview with the Repo Man
programme.desc: The repo team confronts the toughest challenge yet: one-on-one interviews with an anger management specialist. Lyndah and Froy head to the Hollywood Hills to find a luxury sedan.

programme.title: Disaster at the Derby
programme.desc: The team gets back to work, but have their anger management sessions had any effect? Sonia and Lyndah find themselves surrounded by a gang of roller derby girls who've got the skills to protect their car, Lou and Sonia get lost in translation when they're forced to contend with a pair of Russian movers and their yuppie lawyer clients, and Matt, Lou, and Froy are in a battle of the scams when they try to trick a group of con artists into giving up their vehicle.

programme.title: The Trouble with Tractors
programme.desc: The team's work with the anger management specialist starts to pay off with disastrous consequences. Sonia and Froy drive to the country to repo a tractor and are forced to confront a group of irate corporate hayriders, Lou and Sonia wrangle with a confused lady who is missing both her car and her sense of decency, and Matt and Sonia get into a Mexican standoff with a wealthy divorcee, his daughter, and her rageaholic boyfriend.

programme.title: Welcome Back Rotter
programme.desc: Matt and Froy crash the meeting of a fraternal lodge to ask for a car, but instead they get an angry old man with a rifle. Froy and Matt go on a repo that turns into a battle royale.

programme.title: Crunch Time
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy interrupt a debtor and two maids who are getting hands-on with their job. A confrontation with construction workers goes bad, and somebody's vehicle will get destroyed.

programme.desc: “Babysitters Club” star Alicia Silverstone stops by to chat. Plus, Drew and Alicia are joined by dating expert Damona Hoffman, who educates them on red flags as they both navigate the world of online dating. Then, Drew continues her Cookbook Countdown, in advance of the release of her first cookbook “Rebel Homemaker,” and is joined by Molly Yeh to Pilar Valdes to whip up tasty Italian dishes. Plus, it's a very special Drew's News: “Scream” Edition with Danny Pellegrino.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show

Plus, Tamera shares an easy DIY fall decor project of turning your pumpkin into a flower vase. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny side up including a woman who went viral for sending her resume on a cake to Nike to try to score an interview.

programme.title: Best Of Week, With Hugh Grant, Marie Kondo, Drew-Gooder Surprise
programme.desc: In a season two pre-party event, Drew's sharing her favorite moments from season one all week long, sharing bonus content and behind-the-scenes commentary on what really went down. Drew kicks things off by revisiting behind-the-scenes secrets Hugh Grant revealed while filming some of his famous movies. Then, Drew's dream came true when declutter queen Marie Kondo stopped by to share some of her favorite organizational tips. Plus, Drew has a very special surprise for Drew-Gooder Alicia White who created a non-profit focused on the revitalization and development of underserved communities.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Best Friends Hour with Cameron Diaz, Battle of the Bites: Cali Tacos, Hometown SpiritIndianapolis
programme.desc: Cameron Diaz is joining Drew for a BFF hour, where the entire studio audience is filled with best friends. Plus, Cameron and Drew partake in an all new Battle of the Bites: Cali Taco edition! Plus, Drew is celebrating hometown pride all week long with viewers sharing tours of what makes their town so special and unique including today's hometown spirit tour of Indianapolis.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Nicole Byer, Chef Edy Massih, Drew's News
programme.desc: “Grand Crew” star Nicole Byer stops by to chat. Then, chef and entrepreneur Edy Massih whips up za'atar shakshuka with seared halloumi and cherry tomato on the side. Plus, Drew and her co-pilot Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: “Sing 2” actress Reese Witherspoon stops by to chat. Plus, Drew is celebrating nurses all show long in this special nurses' appreciation show, where the entire studio audience is filled with nurses! The fun-filled hour is jam-packed with surprises, incredible nurse Drew-Gooders and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: It's the colorful hour, all-show long Drew celebrates the bold, bright and beautiful colors all around us. In Drew's News, Drew and Ross Mathews chat with Kitten Kay Sera, who recently married the color pink after dating it for 40 years. Then, in Designed by Drew, Drew surprises a deserving mom of three by transforming her beige bedroom into a space full of color and shares her top tips for those who want to go bold. Plus, beauty expert Mi- Anne Chan shares how to shake up your beauty routine at any age with pops of purple.

programme.title: Rachael
programme.sub-title: The Legendary Dolly Parton Is Back and Talking About Her Rock 'n' Roll Album!

programme.title: Rachael
programme.sub-title: Three Viewers Are Taking On Our One-Week-Off Challenge!

programme.sub-title: Jacques Pépin Is Back With One of His Family Favorites: Arroz Con Pollo!

programme.title: Deltas of the World
programme.desc: South of Barcelona lies the Ebro Delta. Its beaches and lagoons are an exceptional refuge for migratory and native bird species. The delta is known for the numerous pink flamingos that nest near the glittering white saltworks. Sea salt is extracted and rice is cultivated in the delta. The impressive lake landscape is endangered to a certain extent by human intervention. For fear of their harvest, some rice farmers take action against flocks of birds. Invasive rice pests are also a threat to farmers in Europe's largest rice growing region. Other problems make the situation more difficult, such as climate change and rising sea levels or dams holding back sediments. What can be done to preserve the unique Ebro Delta?

programme.title: Justice By (Re)design
programme.desc: Necessary rethinks and ambitious yet achievable solutions for redesigning systems to work for all people, not just some. 1) The power of citizen video to create undeniable truths | Yvette Alberdingk Thijm 2) How America's public schools keep kids in poverty | Kandice Sumner 3) The US can move past immigration prisons -- and towards justice | César Cuauhtémoc García Hernández 4) How data-driven journalism illuminates patterns of injustice | Alison Killing

programme.title: Revolutionary Women!
programme.desc: What happens when purpose and passion overshadow fear? A first step toward change... | T. Morgan Dixon and Vanessa Garrison 4) How women will lead us to freedom, justice and peace | H.E. Ellen Johnson Sirleaf

programme.title: School Smarts
programme.desc: Learn something new with these amazing educators as they give enlightening lessons on what's needed to make learning fun and school cool (as in accessible, effective and better overall). 1) The board game getting kids excited about school | Joel Baraka 2) Technology can't fix inequality -- but training and opportunities could | 'Gbenga Sesan 3) Can stereotypes ever be good? | Sheila Marie Orfano and Densho 4) Sex education should start with consent | Kaz 5) The power of creative constraints - Brandon Rodriguez 6) How can we support the emotional well-being of teachers? | Sydney Jensen

programme.title: Psych Out
programme.desc: What makes you, well, you? Young 4) Do politics make us irrational? | Jay Van Bavel 5) 3 kinds of bias that shape your worldview | J. Marshall Shepherd

programme.title: How The Brain Works
programme.desc: How does the brain -- a 3-pound snarl of nervous tissue -- create inspired inventions, the feeling of hunger, the experience of beauty, the sense of self? Researchers at the edge of science explain. 1) Seeing things that aren't there? It's pareidolia | Susan G. Wardle 2) How we're reverse engineering the human brain in the lab | Sergiu P. Pasca 3) How do you explain consciousness? | David Chalmers 4) Could your brain repair itself? - Ralitsa Petrova 5) Can I have your brain? The quest for truth on concussions and CTE | Chris Nowinski

programme.title: Did You Know ... ?
programme.desc: Are you as smart as these brilliant minds? Find out. You may learn a thing or two. 1) Why do we have crooked teeth when our ancestors didn't? | G. Richard Scott 2) The myth of Icarus and Daedalus - Amy Adkins 3) Who owns the "wilderness"? | Elyse Cox 4) Where do werewolves come from? 5) The Egyptian myth of the death of Osiris | Alex Gendler 6) Why do you get a fever when you're sick? | Christian Moro 7) Why do animals form swarms? - Maria R. D'Orsogna 8) The myth of the Sampo— an infinite source of fortune and greed | Hanna-Ilona Härmävaara 9) How do ventilators work? | Alex Gendler 10) Why are human bodies asymmetrical? - Leo Q. Wan 11) The Chinese myth of the white snake and the meddling monk | Shunan Teng

programme.title: The Creative Zone
programme.desc: What makes us create and innovate? Making mistakes | Phil Plait 5) The AI-powered tools supercharging your imagination | Bilawal Sidhu 6) The secret to being a successful freelancer | Paco de Leon

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Water
programme.desc: Three explorations into the wild water that makes up over 70% of our angry planet. First, George travels to Guadaloupe Island off the coast of Mexico to dive with 16 foot Great White Sharks. He then uses drysuit and kayak to retrace the explorations of Tom Woodward into a flooded Northern Ontario cave in the middle of winter, then jetboats into the worlds biggest Class VI whitewater rapids in the Niagara River.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Avalanche
programme.desc: Avalanche danger is very high in the Rogers Pass area of the Trans Canada Highway in British Columbia. Host of Angry Planet George Kourounis travels with a variety of experts to bring down huge avalanches in the Rocky Mountains. Ski Patrollers throw hand charges to clear the slopes, the British Columbia Department of Highways uses helicopter bombing and mountaintop mortars to keep the roads safe, and the Canadian Armed Forces fire 105mm howitzers at the mountains to bring down the dangerous snow. Still, there are accidents and fatalities in the mountains. We meet Francois Desroisers, an avalanche burial victim who tells a terrible and tragic tale of a mountain disaster.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Blizzard
programme.desc: Mount Washington, New Hampshire has the dubious title of being home to the worlds worst weather. The highest wind ever recorded on the planet 231 miles per hour was recorded at its mountaintop observatory. To prepare for a mid-winter assault on the summit, Angry Planet host George Kourounis becomes a human popsicle, encased in ice in at the National Resarch Councils high speed wind tunnel. Then he and his sidekick Mark Robinson climb to the top of the mountain in mid-January and brave their way into a summit blizzard.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Fin del Mundo
programme.desc: Some of the fiercest weather on the planet can be experienced at the southern tip of Argentina and Chile the area the South Americans call the Fin del Mundo the end of the world. Host George Kourounis travels to Ushuaia, Argentina, sails south on the expedition sailboat Northanger to round infamous Cape Horn, then climbs the spectacular but rapidly melting glaciers along the Beagle Channel.

programme.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 4.4
programme.desc: Get ready to witness the mistakes and mischiefs of our wild friends

programme.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 4.5
programme.desc: Birds of a feather flock together

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Tornado Terror
programme.desc: Having witnessed the ravages of a deadly tornado just a few days earlier, on the last day of their chase the storm hunters are again shaken to the core by a giant, unpredictable tornado.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Nature's Fury
programme.desc: On only her second trip storm chasing, meteorologist Jaclyn Whittal joins Mark Robinson in a shocking and gut-wrenching ride through the US Midwest during the most prolific and dangerous tornado season on record.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Fire and Water
programme.desc: With summer wildfires overpowering the Yukon forests, host/adventurer George Kourounis follows the fabled route of the Klondike Gold Rush sourdoughs through the bawdy town of Skagway, Alaska, paddling the white water rivers and the White Horse Rapids into the Yukon. He travels on mountain bike, steam train and Cessna to experience the huge fires and meet the northern fire crews battling the blazes.

programme.title: Angry Planet | The Winds of Autumn
programme.desc: The autumn of 2006 brings hurricanes to the North Atlantic and hot dry winds fan forest fires across Northern Ontario. Host/adventurer George Kourounis has traveled to some awesome hurricanes, including Rita and Katrina, with his pal Mark Robinson. This year they stormchase in Newfoundland, site of the hurricane that pulled Mark out of a life-threatening depression.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Wild Weather of 2005
programme.desc: 2005 saw some of the wildest weather in the history of the planet. Host/adventurer George Kourounis tracks twisters through the Tornado Alley of Oklahoma and Texas, descends into the Erte Ale Volcano in the Danakil Depression of Ethiopia (the worlds hottest place), and then witnesses Hurricane Katrina destroying the town of Gulfport, Mississippi, from a steel-reinforced bunker facing the debris-strewn beachfront.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Volcanic Wedding
programme.desc: Host George Kourounis has braved many terrifying phenomena but none as frightening as the one he takes on in this episode: marriage! To make sure his new bride is on the same adventurous page with him, he proposes to get married on the lip of an exploding volcano, on the South Pacific island of Tanna, in Vanuatu. Before the native preacher, dressed in grass skirt and kustom garb, gets to perform the smoky vows, George descends into the erupting volcano to bring out red hot samples of the lava it is producing.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Traverse The Dam, Bee Headed, Water Coffin
programme.desc: Are you worth a Dam? Suspended high over a dam is a 350-foot long tightrope with flags attached. Contestants would have to cross the tightrope and collect flags while holding on to a higher tightrope for support. The two men and the two women to collect the most flags in 5 minutes would advance to the next round. Stunt 2 is a real Bee. The ones left are covered with over 200,000 honeybees. Once covered, they would have stand for 2 minutes covered in bees. All contestants who completed this stunt would advance to the finals. For the finale, contestants are locked inside a Plexiglas box full of holes and submerged underwater. Once a red light came on, they would have to figure out which of 2 keys unlocked the coffin and swim to the surface. The contestant to complete this stunt the fastest would be the Fear Factor Champion.

programme.title: Weekend Wanderlust
programme.desc: Urban Landscapes S1E1 — Discover the artistic pulse that beats within the soul of the city! Captivating cityscapes and skylines, alive with movement and bold architectural beauty, showcase the essence of modern life and exude the electric energy through the vibrant hues.

programme.title: Weekend Wanderlust
programme.desc: Epic Landscapes S1E2: Lakes Rivers & Oceans — Discover an enchanting collection featuring breathtaking photographs of epic waterscapes. Immerse yourself in the picturesque beauty of serene lakes, meandering rivers, and vast oceans, capturing the awe-inspiring harmony of water's natural grandeur.

programme.title: Weekend Wanderlust
programme.desc: Holiday Cheer S1E3: Winter Visions — Step into a world where each artwork transports viewers to a whimsical realm where snowflakes dance & twinkling lights & laughter fills the air. The music in sets a groovy and euphoric holiday tone featuring flutes, bells, strings, and synth pads.

programme.title: Weekend Wanderlust
programme.desc: Earth And Stars S1E3: Earth Day — A beautiful, artistic tribute to our planet, from splendid skyscapes and depictions of our solar system, to sprawling forests, snow-capped mountains, and marine animals. The range of styles explore our connection to the vast and vivid universe.

programme.title: Weekend Wanderlust
programme.desc: Autumn Harvest S1E2 — Immerse yourself in a kaleidoscope of fall foliage, where trees dance in radiant shades and leaves gently cascade in the crisp breeze. Delight in intricate still-life images capturing the essence of pumpkin spice and evoking a sense of nostalgia

programme.title: Weekend Wanderlust
programme.desc: Autumn Harvest S1E1 — A captivating art collection that embraces the colors of fall and the cozy ambiance of pumpkin spice. This assortment of artworks celebrates the rich palette of warm hues, including burnt oranges, golden yellows, deep reds, and earthy browns.
